intentSynonyms: show me my sub issues in linear
view my sub issues in linear
see all my sub issues in linear
list sub-issues of an issue in linear
description: List child/sub-issues of a parent Linear issue.

issue_id.description: Parent issue UUID to list sub-issues for

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 25, max 50)

after.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
